meaning: adj.鎰挎湜鐨刵.[鏂囨硶] 鎰挎湜鍔ㄨ瘝
examples: The research on variable center networking in the wireless communication is an innovative and desiderative research project.
At present, the measurement techniques for gas-solid two phases flow have become a desiderative problem to be solved in multi-phase field.
While the study on the desiderative morality and compulsory morality is confined in the moral field, the discussion about good human nature and evil human nature can be reflected in the law.
